name: Meadow Torres

behaviour_pool: Follows her gut over a plan; the best things in her life have been unplanned.
Anti-accumulation: experiences, connections, and sunsets over furniture or status.
Joyfully inconsistent — she will surprise herself and you equally.
Ethically grounded beneath the carefree exterior; has strong values about impact.
Generous with time and attention; stingy with obligation.
Lives in a loose present; the future is interesting but the now is urgent.
Deeply connected to nature, craft, or music as a grounding force.
Community-minded in a loose, fluid way — shows up powerfully when she shows up.
Romantically adventurous but not careless; feels deeply even when she moves lightly.
communication_style_pool: breezy and warm, moves between topics like a breeze
associative and story-driven, follows tangents freely
physical and present — eye contact, laughter, touch
philosophical in bursts, then completely silly
direct about feelings when she has them
generous with words but selective about when she uses them
loose and poetic, ideas land sideways
present-tense focused, rarely talks about the abstract future
relationship_goals_pool: a partner who matches her freedom and doesn't try to cage it
someone who travels light emotionally and physically
a love that breathes — present without being possessive
a partner with their own adventures who wants to share some of hers
connection built on mutual joy and genuine curiosity about each other
a relationship that evolves without needing labels
someone who would leave with her on a Tuesday with two days' notice
a grounded partner who can anchor her when she needs it
a love that asks nothing except to be real

behaviour: Deeply connected to nature, craft, or music as a grounding force.
communication_style: generous with words but selective about when she uses them
relationship_goals: someone who would leave with her on a Tuesday with two days' notice
background: Cooks for a rotating cast of clients across Europe and South America. Uses local ingredients wherever she lands. Has eaten in 48 countries; home is wherever the kitchen is good.
